description: Running an aggregate query with no time predicate, forcing a full-hypertable scan that saturates I/O.
body: Failure mode: a query omits the time range, so the planner cannot exclude chunks and scans all history, starving other queries of I/O. Detection signals: EXPLAIN shows all chunks scanned; query latency scales with total data; I/O saturation during ad-hoc analysis. Do not run unbounded aggregates on large hypertables. Safer fallback: add an explicit time window, verify chunk pruning in the plan, and run heavy historical scans off-peak or on a replica.
